/usr/bin/ar qc libcevicp.a CMakeFiles/cevicp.dir/lib/algo/kdtree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cevicp.dir/lib/algo/quickselect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cevicp.dir/lib/icp/icp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cevicp.dir/lib/icp/impl/vanilla.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cevicp.dir/lib/icp/impl/trimmed.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cevicp.dir/lib/icp/impl/feature_aware.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cevicp.dir/lib/icp/impl/vanilla_3d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cevicp.dir/lib/icp/impl/trimmed_3d.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcevicp.a
